intent: Add a read-only dispatch advisor agent, integrate adversarial quality and single-model delivery risk checks into routing, and clarify every agent description for safer main-session dispatch.
fast_path_reason: Harness self-maintenance across shell hooks and docs with local deterministic verification.

evidence.functional: 39 agent descriptions checked for who/next-hop coverage; validate-rules, test-hook-flags, validate-dispatch-ticket, and doctor completed without failures
evidence.verdict: doctor Release Readiness passed with README badges Agents=39 Rules=53 Skills=58 and 调度顾问师 read-only tool boundary confirmed

assumptions: 调度顾问师 should remain read-only and advise rather than dispatch or write state.
Agent description clarity directly improves main-session routing accuracy.
调度顾问师 must dynamically read dispatch-table and agents frontmatter instead of relying on a static agent list.

decision_summary: Added 调度顾问师 as a read-only reverse advisor, made it dynamically read dispatch-table and agents frontmatter, and normalized all Agent descriptions to reduce routing ambiguity, role overlap, gate skipping, and single-model self-certification risk.

iteration.pass_condition: Agent count, doctor, rules validation, hook tests, ticket validation, and git diff checks pass.
